title: imagebuildah resolveSymlink: fix handling of relative links
body: We don't need to put in as much effort as `getSymbolicLink()` does when we're already in a chroot, so switch back to using `filepath.EvalSymlinks()` to evaluate the path.

comments.body: Yeah, that routine included some handling of corner cases that we don't get for free from `filepath.EvalSymlinks()`.  Going to have to restore part of it.
